title: A Prince of Lovers
body: A Prince of Lovers, also known as The Life of Lord Byron, is a 1922 British silent biographical film directed by Charles Calvert and starring Howard Gaye, Marjorie Hume and Mary Clare. The film portrays the life of the British writer Lord Byron, and was based on Alicia Ramsey's play Byron (1908).
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in British English
